tools.name: addresses_match
tools.description: Match messy addresses to canonical UK addresses.

tools.name: boe_series
tools.description: Fetch Bank of England statistical series as CSV (Bank Rate, gilt yields, money supply, exchange rates).

tools.name: contracts_search
tools.description: Search Contracts Finder for UK government procurement notices (OCDS format).

kind.description: Operation mode for the target API.

id.description: Optional record identifier for detail endpoints.

page.description: Optional page index for paginated APIs.

limit.description: Optional page size/limit, when the API supports it.

pageSize.description: Optional page size for Democracy Club and similar APIs.

current.description: Optional current=true filter for election lookups.

electionDateFrom.description: Optional lower-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD) for election filtering.

tools.name: councillors_fetchOpenCouncilData
tools.description: Download Open Council Data CSV for a given year.

tools.name: councillors_search
tools.description: Query councillor records from server-local councillor CSV snapshots.

tools.name: desnz_energy
tools.description: Fetch DESNZ subnational electricity or gas consumption by local authority (CSV, 2005-2024).

tools.name: desnz_fetchCo2
tools.description: Fetch DESNZ local authority CO2 emissions CSV. Results may be large; narrow downstream parsing to requested geographies/years.

tools.name: desnz_fetchEnergy
tools.description: Fetch DESNZ subnational energy/fuel-poverty CSV. Results may be large; parse/filter for required geography/year range.

tools.name: dft_roadTraffic
tools.description: Query DfT road traffic count points and annual average daily flows.

tools.name: ea_flood
tools.description: Query Environment Agency flood monitoring stations, readings, warnings, and 3-day forecasts.

tools.name: ea_rainfall
tools.description: Query EA rainfall gauge stations across England. List stations by proximity (lat/lng/dist), get station detail, or fetch 15-minute tipping-bucket readings with time range.

tools.name: electoral_lookup
tools.description: Look up Electoral Commission data for UK elections and polling stations.

kind.description: Operation mode for the target API.

id.description: Optional record identifier for detail endpoints.

page.description: Optional page index for paginated APIs.

limit.description: Optional page size/limit, when the API supports it.

pageSize.description: Optional page size for Democracy Club and similar APIs.

current.description: Optional current=true filter for election lookups.

electionDateFrom.description: Optional lower-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD) for election filtering.

tools.name: electoral_reformLocalCandidates
tools.description: Find Reform UK local election candidates via Democracy Club.

kind.description: Operation mode for the target API.

id.description: Optional record identifier for detail endpoints.

page.description: Optional page index for paginated APIs.

limit.description: Optional page size/limit, when the API supports it.

pageSize.description: Optional page size for Democracy Club and similar APIs.

current.description: Optional current=true filter for election lookups.

electionDateFrom.description: Optional lower-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD) for election filtering.

tools.name: finance_laRevenue
tools.description: Fetch DLUHC local authority revenue outturn time series (England council finance CSV).

tools.name: fingertips_fetchIndicator
tools.description: Query Fingertips area types, indicator search, profiles, or all-data CSV by indicator IDs. For all_data_by_indicator, pass small indicatorIds batches and optional areaTypeId.

tools.name: fsa_search
tools.description: Search Food Standards Agency hygiene ratings by name, address, or location.

tools.name: geo_convertCode
tools.description: Convert one geography code to another via lookup tables.

tools.name: geo_listLookups
tools.description: List available geography lookup/conversion mappings.

tools.name: govuk_search
tools.description: Search GOV.UK content or fetch UK bank holidays data.

tools.name: ingest_classify
tools.description: Classify candidate endpoint into api/feed/artifact/scrape.

tools.name: ingest_discover
tools.description: Discover candidate hard-to-find ingestion endpoints.

tools.name: ingest_land
tools.description: Land immutable artifact snapshot and fingerprint it.

tools.name: ingest_normalizeHard
tools.description: Normalize hard-source payload with explicit parser/provenance.

tools.name: ingest_probe
tools.description: Probe a candidate endpoint and infer source type/format.

tools.name: ingest_resolveGeo
tools.description: Resolve address and geography joins for hard-source records.

tools.name: metoffice_fetchSeries
tools.description: Fetch Met Office historic climate station series text data. Scope with dataset/area to reduce response size.

tools.name: names_popularity
tools.description: Retrieve UK baby names regional popularity dataset metadata from ONS.

tools.name: nhs_findServices
tools.description: Find nearby NHS services by postcode, query, or coordinates.

tools.name: ni_data
tools.description: Search and browse Northern Ireland open datasets via OpenDataNI (CKAN). Census, demographics, public services.

tools.name: nomis_fetchTable
tools.description: Query NOMIS census and labour market tables. Always set dataset and scope filters (geography/date/measures); paginate via recordlimit/recordoffset (default recordlimit 500).

dataset.description: NOMIS dataset identifier, for example NM_17_5.

geography.description: Optional NOMIS geography filter (for example E08000003 or 2092957698TYPE299).

date.description: Optional NOMIS date filter, for example latestMINUS2 or 2021.

measures.description: Optional NOMIS measure filter, for example 20100 (value).

recordlimit.description: Rows per page. Keep small for exploratory calls; increase only when needed.

recordoffset.description: Pagination offset. Use with recordlimit for paging.

tools.name: nomis_listDatasets
tools.description: List available NOMIS datasets from the dataset definition endpoint.

tools.name: nrw_rainfall
tools.description: Query NRW rainfall gauge stations across Wales. List stations, get station detail, fetch recent readings (1d–28d), or retrieve 12-month long-term averages vs actuals.

tools.name: ons_censusObservations
tools.description: Fetch ONS Census observations for one populationType/areaType/dimension set. Use tight dimensions and paginate with limit/offset (default limit 500).

populationType.description: Census population type slug, for example usual-residents.

areaType.description: Census area type code, for example ltla.

dimensions.description: Dimension selectors in key=value form, for example sex=0.

limit.description: Rows per page. Increase only after validating filters.

tools.name: ons_fetchDataset
tools.description: Fetch ONS datasets by dataset ID with optional edition and version filters.

datasetId.description: ONS dataset ID, for example cpih01.

edition.description: Dataset edition. Defaults to time-series when omitted.

version.description: Edition version. Use latest unless pinning a known version.

tools.name: ons_fetchGeography
tools.description: Fetch ONS ArcGIS geography boundaries. Requires layerUrl from ons.listGeographyLayers; prefer explicit outFields (avoid "*") and paginate with resultRecordCount/resultOffset (default 250).

layerUrl.description: Full ArcGIS FeatureServer layer URL from ons.listGeographyLayers output.

where.description: ArcGIS where clause. Use tighter filters than 1=1 when possible.

outFields.description: Comma-separated fields to return. Prefer explicit fields instead of * for smaller payloads.

resultRecordCount.description: Rows per page for ArcGIS query pagination.

tools.name: ons_fetchObservations
tools.description: Fetch ONS dataset observation rows. Always set dimensions for scope; paginate with limit/offset (default limit 100).

dimensions.description: Dimension filters as key/value pairs, for example { geography: "E08000003" }.

limit.description: Rows per page. Keep small for exploratory calls.

tools.name: ons_listAreaTypes
tools.description: List area types for a given ONS Census population type.

tools.name: ons_listCensusDimensions
tools.description: List Census dimensions for a given ONS population type.

tools.name: ons_listDatasets
tools.description: List or search ONS datasets from the dataset catalogue endpoint.

tools.name: ons_listGeographyLayers
tools.description: List available ONS ArcGIS geography layers. Use to discover current layerUrls for ons.fetchGeography. Optionally filter by name substring.

tools.name: ons_listPopulationTypes
tools.description: List available ONS Census 2021 population types.

tools.name: ons_search
tools.description: Search ONS content across datasets, time series, bulletins, and methodology documents.

tools.name: osm_assets
tools.description: Query OpenStreetMap via Overpass or Nominatim for UK geographic assets and POIs. Always constrain requests with bbox/query/osmTag and keep limits small to avoid very large payloads.

tools.name: parliament_committees
tools.description: List, inspect, or view members of UK Parliament committees.

tools.name: parliament_fetchHansard
tools.description: Query the Hansard API for debates, divisions, and search results.

tools.name: parliament_fetchMembers
tools.description: Search UK Parliament members by name with pagination.

tools.name: parliament_fetchSparql
tools.description: Run a SPARQL query against the UK Parliament endpoint. Keep queries selective and include LIMIT (server defaults to 1000 when omitted).

tools.name: parliament_hansard
tools.description: Search Hansard parliamentary debates, divisions, and historic records.

tools.name: parliament_interests
tools.description: Search the Register of Members Financial Interests or view interests by MP.

tools.name: parliament_questions
tools.description: Search parliamentary written questions and fetch detailed question records.

tools.name: parliament_votes
tools.description: Search Commons divisions, inspect a division, or fetch MP voting records.

tools.name: planning_search
tools.description: Search the Planning Data platform for planning applications and entities in England.

kind.description: Operation mode for the target API.

id.description: Optional record identifier for detail endpoints.

page.description: Optional page index for paginated APIs.

limit.description: Optional page size/limit, when the API supports it.

pageSize.description: Optional page size for Democracy Club and similar APIs.

current.description: Optional current=true filter for election lookups.

electionDateFrom.description: Optional lower-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD) for election filtering.

tools.name: police_fetchCrimes
tools.description: Fetch street-level crime data for a location and month. Keep limit small (default 100, max 500) and narrow category where possible.

tools.name: postcodes_lookup
tools.description: Look up UK postcodes, reverse-geocode coordinates, validate postcodes, or find nearest postcodes via Postcodes.io.

tools.name: postcodes_matchOa
tools.description: Match postcodes to Output Areas (OA21) using local lookup artifacts.

tools.name: scotland_stats
tools.description: Query Scottish Government statistics via statistics.gov.scot (datasets, observations, or SPARQL). Start with datasets, then narrow observations by datasetSlug/dimensions; keep limit small (default 50).

tools.name: sepa_rainfall
tools.description: Query SEPA rainfall monitoring stations and monthly data for Scotland.

tools.name: social_bsa
tools.description: Retrieve British Social Attitudes survey metadata and latest release summary.

tools.name: sources_describe
tools.description: Describe one source operation contract and metadata.

tools.name: sources_fetch
tools.description: Generic source router. Always provide source and scoped params (filters + pagination). Prefer sources.describe and typed convenience tools first; unfiltered calls can be large and may be truncated.

tools.name: sources_list
tools.description: List all supported source operations and families.

tools.name: sources_normalize
tools.description: Normalize source payload into stable MCP response contract.

tools.name: tfl_fetch
tools.description: Query Transport for London: tube/bus line status, bike points, or stop arrivals.

tools.name: wales_stats
tools.description: Query StatsWales open data: browse datasets/topics first, then use view with datasetId + filter. Paginate with pageSize/pageNumber (default pageSize 20).
